title: Custom CTA Submit Color - Workform
excerpt: Feature to custom the Call to Action button Color in a Monday Workform. Default colour is “violet-pink”.

posts.author: Alfonso (Alfonso)
posts.cookedHtml: Feature to custom the Call to Action button Color in a Monday Workform. Default colour is “violet-pink”.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey

Nachliel from Easyapps here

Our monday app Easyform allows you to style any element in the form including the color of the submit button. Additionally we support giving default values to Status and Dropdown columns and more advanced features, you can see this all in our extensive documentation site.

You can set up a free demo here or contact us at support@easyappshq.com.

Here is an example of our form in action:

I hope this helps

Nachliel

posts.author: Marenatteo (Matteo Arena)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I have the same problem. I think it’s paradoxical that Monday allows you to customize the background and graphics of the form without then allowing you to change the color of the progress and submit buttons on the form. Furthermore, allowing the color of the buttons to be changed would be a very trivial thing to implement.
